hero.description: I build interactive, responsive, and performance-driven web applications that provide an outstanding user experience.

experiences.description: I worked as a Full Stack Developer intern in the team developing scalable SaaS projects. By improving myself in modern web technologies, I took an active role in both frontend and backend processes and gained experience in performance optimizations. I continue to actively learn the development process and contribute to projects.
Developed and maintained multiple client websites using React and modern CSS frameworks.
Assisted in building UI components and managing state for an internal dashboard tool.

items.title: FinTech Mobile App
items.description: A cross-platform mobile application for personal finance management. Users can track expenses and set budgets.

items.title: Collaborative Workspace
